01-ai/yi-1.5-9b-chat.description: Zero One Everything, den senaste öppenkällkods-finjusterade modellen med 9 miljarder parametrar som stöder olika dialogscenarier med högkvalitativ träningsdata anpassad efter mänskliga preferenser.

360/deepseek-r1.description: [360 Distributionsversion] DeepSeek-R1 använder omfattande förstärkningsinlärningstekniker i efterträningsfasen och förbättrar avsevärt modellens inferensförmåga med minimal märkt data.

360gpt-pro.description: 360GPT Pro är en avancerad AI-modell utvecklad av 360, som erbjuder kraftfulla språkförståelse- och innehållsgenereringsförmågor, lämplig för komplexare uppgifter.

360gpt-turbo.description: 360GPT Turbo är en snabb AI-modell utvecklad av 360, som erbjuder kostnadseffektiv och snabb prestanda, lämplig för hantering av stora mängder förfrågningar.

360gpt-turbo-responsibility-8k.description: 360GPT Turbo Responsibility 8K är en AI-modell utvecklad av 360, designad med säkerhets- och ansvarsmekanismer, lämplig för scenarier som kräver högre compliance-standarder.

360gpt2-o1.description: 360GPT2-o1 är 360s avancerade resonemangsmodell som levererar toppmodern prestanda.

360gpt2-pro.description: 360GPT2 Pro är en uppgraderad version av 360GPT, med förbättrad förståelse och genereringsförmåga, som ger kraftfullare naturlig språkbehandling.

360zhinao2-o1.description: 360ZhiNao2-o1 är 360s intelligenta resonemangsmodell designad för komplexa kognitiva uppgifter.

Baichuan3-Turbo-128k.description: Baichuan3 Turbo 128K stöder extra långa kontextfönster för omfattande textbearbetning.

Baichuan4-Turbo.description: Baichuan4 Turbo är den snabbaste Baichuan4-varianten för realtidsapplikationer.

ByteDance-Seed/Seed-OSS-36B-Instruct.description: Seed OSS 36B Instruct är ByteDances öppenkällkods instruktionsjusterade modell med 36 miljarder parametrar.

DeepSeek-R1.description: DeepSeek R1 är en avancerad resonemangsmodell med 671 miljarder parametrar som levererar exceptionell prestanda.

DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B.description: DeepSeek R1 Distill Llama 70B är en destillerad version som kombinerar resonemangsförmågor med Llama-effektivitet.

DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B.description: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 1.5B är en ultrakompakt destillerad resonemangsmodell.

DeepSeek-V3.description: DeepSeek V3 är den senaste generationen med 671 miljarder parametrar och 37 miljarder aktiverade.

DeepSeek-V3-1.description: DeepSeek V3.1: Next-generation reasoning model, förbättrar complex reasoning och chain-of-thought capabilities, ideal för tasks requiring i-depth analysis.

DeepSeek-V3-Fast.description: Model provider: sophnet platform. DeepSeek V3 Fast is high-TPS ultra-fast version of DeepSeek V3 0324, fully powered without quantization, med enhanced coding och mathematical capabilities för faster response!

DeepSeek-V3.1.description: DeepSeek-V3.1 - Non-Thinking Mode; DeepSeek-V3.1 är en newly launched hybrid reasoning model by DeepSeek, supporting both thinking och non-thinking reasoning modes, med higher thinking efficiency compared to DeepSeek-R1-0528. Post-training optimization significantly enhances agent tool usage och agent task performance.

DeepSeek-V3.1-Fast.description: DeepSeek V3.1 Fast is high-TPS, ultra-fast version of DeepSeek V3.1. Hybrid Thinking Mode: By changing chat template, a single model can support both thinking och non-thinking modes simultaneously. Smarter Tool Invocation: Post-training optimization significantly improves model's performance i tool usage och agent tasks.

DeepSeek-V3.1-Think.description: DeepSeek-V3.1 - Thinking Mode; DeepSeek-V3.1 är en newly launched hybrid reasoning model by DeepSeek, supporting both thinking och non-thinking reasoning modes, med higher thinking efficiency compared to DeepSeek-R1-0528. Post-training optimization significantly enhances agent tool usage och agent task performance.

DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp.description: DeepSeek V3.2 is latest general-purpose large model released by DeepSeek, supporting a hybrid inference architecture och med enhanced Agent capabilities.

DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp-Think.description: DeepSeek V3.2 Thinking Mode. Before outputting final answer, model first generates a chain of thought to improve accuracy of final response.

Doubao-lite-128k.description: Doubao Lite 128K-modellen är en effektiv och lågkostnadsmodell som stöder extra långa kontextfönster, lämplig för att hantera stora mängder textinnehåll.

Doubao-lite-32k.description: Doubao Lite 32K-modellen är en effektiv och lågkostnadsmodell som stöder långa kontextfönster, lämplig för att hantera stora mängder textinnehåll.

Doubao-lite-4k.description: Doubao Lite 4K-modellen är en effektiv och lågkostnadsmodell som stöder standardkontextfönster, lämplig för att hantera vanligt textinnehåll.

Doubao-pro-128k.description: Doubao Pro 128K-modellen är en högpresterande modell som stöder extra långa kontextfönster, lämplig för hantering av komplexa uppgifter och stora mängder textinnehåll.

Doubao-pro-32k.description: Doubao Pro 32K-modellen är en högpresterande modell som stöder långa kontextfönster, lämplig för hantering av komplexa uppgifter och stora mängder textinnehåll.

Doubao-pro-4k.description: Doubao Pro 4K-modellen är en högpresterande modell som stöder standardkontextfönster, lämplig för hantering av vanliga komplexa uppgifter.

DreamO.description: DreamO är en open-source image customization generation model jointly developed by ByteDance och Peking University, designed to support multi-task image generation through a unified architecture. It employs an efficient compositional modeling approach to generate highly consistent och customized images based på multiple user-specified conditions such as identity, subject, style, och background.

ERNIE-3.5-128K.description: ERNIE 3.5 128K är Baidus storskaliga språkmodell som stöder extra långa kontextfönster, lämplig för att hantera stora mängder textinnehåll och komplexa uppgifter.

ERNIE-3.5-8K.description: ERNIE 3.5 8K är Baidus storskaliga språkmodell som stöder standardkontextfönster, lämplig för vanliga uppgifter inom naturlig språkbehandling.

ERNIE-3.5-8K-Preview.description: ERNIE 3.5 8K Preview är en förhandsversion av Baidus storskaliga språkmodell, som erbjuder de senaste funktionerna och förbättringarna.

ERNIE-4.0-8K-Latest.description: Baidu's self-developed flagship ultra-large-scale language model, which has achieved a comprehensive upgrade i model capabilities compared to ERNIE 3.5, widely applicable to complex task scenarios across various fields; stöder automatic integration med Baidu search plugins to ensure timeliness of Q&A information.

ERNIE-4.0-8K-Preview.description: ERNIE 4.0 8K Preview är en förhandsversion av Baidus senaste storskaliga språkmodell, som erbjuder de mest avancerade funktionerna.

ERNIE-4.0-Turbo-8K-Latest.description: Baidu's self-developed flagship ultra-large-scale language model, demonstrating excellent overall performance, lämplig för complex task scenarios across various fields; stöder automatic integration med Baidu search plugins to ensure timeliness of Q&A information. It erbjuder better performance compared to ERNIE 4.0.

ERNIE-4.0-Turbo-8K-Preview.description: ERNIE 4.0 Turbo 8K Preview är en förhandsversion av Baidus högpresterande språkmodell, som erbjuder de senaste optimeringarna.

ERNIE-Character-8K.description: Baidu's self-developed vertical scene large language model, lämplig för applications such as game NPCs, customer service dialogues, och role-playing conversations, med more distinct och consistent character styles, stronger adherence to instructions, och superior inference performance.

ERNIE-Lite-Pro-128K.description: Baidu's self-developed lättviktig large language model, balancing excellent model performance med inference efficiency, offering better results than ERNIE Lite, lämplig för inference på low-power AI acceleration cards.

ERNIE-Speed-128K.description: ERNIE Speed 128K är Baidus snabba modell som stöder extra långa kontextfönster, lämplig för scenarier som kräver både snabbhet och långt sammanhang.

ERNIE-Speed-Pro-128K.description: Baidu's latest self-developed high-performance large language model released i 2024, med outstanding general capabilities, providing better results than ERNIE Speed, suitable as a base model för fine-tuning, effectively addressing specific scenario issues while also exhibiting excellent inference performance.

FLUX.1-Kontext-dev.description: FLUX.1-Kontext-dev är en multimodal image generation och editing model developed by Black Forest Labs based på Rectified Flow Transformer architecture, med 12 billion parameters. It specializes i generating, reconstructing, förbättrar, or editing images under given contextual conditions. The model combines controllable generation advantages of diffusion models med contextual modeling capabilities of Transformers, supporting high-quality image output och widely applicable to image restoration, completion, och visual scene reconstruction tasks.

FLUX.1-dev.description: FLUX.1-dev är en avancerad text-till-bild-modell för högkvalitativ bildgenerering.

Gryphe/MythoMax-L2-13b.description: MythoMax-L2 (13B) är en innovative model lämplig för multi-domain applications och complex tasks.

HelloMeme.description: HelloMeme är en AI tool som automatically generates memes, GIFs, or short videos based på images or actions you provide. It requires no drawing or programming skills; simply prepare reference images, och it kommer help you create visually appealing, fun, och stylistically consistent content.

HiDream-I1-Full.description: HiDream-E1-Full är en open-source multimodal image editing large model launched by HiDream.ai, based på advanced Diffusion Transformer architecture combined med powerful language understanding capabilities (embedded LLaMA 3.1-8B-Instruct). It stöder image generation, style transfer, local editing, och content repainting through natural language instructions, demonstrating excellent vision-language comprehension och execution abilities.

HunyuanDiT-v1.2-Diffusers-Distilled.description: hunyuandit-v1.2-distilled är en lättviktig text-to-image model optimized through distillation, kan rapidly generating high-quality images, especially lämplig för low-resource environments och realtid generation tasks.

InstantCharacter.description: InstantCharacter är en tuning-free personalized character generation model released by Tencent AI team i 2025, designed to achieve high-fidelity, cross-scene consistent character generation. The model stöder character modeling based på a single reference image och can flexibly transfer character to various styles, actions, och backgrounds.

InternVL2-8B.description: InternVL2-8B är en powerful visual language model som stöder multimodal processing of images och text, kan accurately recognizing image content och generating relevant descriptions or answers.

InternVL2.5-26B.description: InternVL2.5-26B är en powerful visual language model som stöder multimodal processing of images och text, kan accurately recognizing image content och generating relevant descriptions or answers.

Kolors.description: Kolors är en text-to-image model developed by Kuaishou Kolors team. Trained med billions of parameters, it utmärker sig i visual quality, Chinese semantic understanding, och text rendering.

Kwai-Kolors/Kolors.description: Kolors är en large-scale latent diffusion text-to-image generation model developed by Kuaishou Kolors team. Trained på billions of text-image pairs, it visar significant advantages i visual quality, complex semantic accuracy, och Chinese och English character rendering. It stöder both Chinese och English inputs och performs exceptionally well i understanding och generating Chinese-specific content.

Llama-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct.description: Exhibits outstanding image reasoning capabilities på high-resolution images, lämplig för visual understanding applications.

Llama-3.2-90B-Vision-Instruct\t.description: Advanced image reasoning capabilities lämplig för visual understanding agent applications.

Meta-Llama-3-3-70B-Instruct.description: Llama 3.3 70B: A versatile Transformer model lämplig för conversational och generative tasks.

Meta-Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct.description: Llama 3.1 instruction-tuned text model optimerad för multilingual dialogue use cases, performing excellently på common industry benchmarks among many available open-source och closed chat models.

Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct.description: Llama 3.1 instruction-tuned text model optimerad för multilingual dialogue use cases, performing excellently på common industry benchmarks among many available open-source och closed chat models.

Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct.description: Llama 3.1 instruction-tuned text model optimerad för multilingual dialogue use cases, performing excellently på common industry benchmarks among many available open-source och closed chat models.

Meta-Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct.description: An advanced banbrytande small language model med language understanding, excellent reasoning capabilities, och text generation abilities.

Meta-Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct.description: An advanced banbrytande small language model med language understanding, excellent reasoning capabilities, och text generation abilities.

Meta-Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct.description: Llama 3.3 is most advanced multilingual open-source large language model i Llama series, offering performance comparable to a 405B model vid a very low cost. Based på Transformer architecture, it enhances usability och safety through supervised fine-tuning (SFT) och reinforcement learning från human feedback (RLHF). Its instruction-tuned version is optimerad för multilingual dialogue och outperforms many open-source och closed chat models på various industry benchmarks. Knowledge cutoff date is December 2023.

Meta-Llama-4-Maverick-17B-128E-Instruct-.description: Llama 4 Maverick: A large-scale model based på Mixture-of-Experts, offering an efficient expert activation strategy för superior inference performance.

MiniMax-M1.description: A brand-new self-developed inference model. Globally leading: 80K reasoning chains x 1M input, performance comparable to top overseas models.

MiniMax-Text-01.description: i MiniMax-01 series of models, we har made bold innovations: för first time, we har implemented a linear attention mechanism på a large scale, making traditional Transformer architecture no longer only option. Denna model has a parameter count of up to 456 billion, med a single activation of 45.9 billion. Its overall performance rivals som of top overseas models while efficiently handling world's longest context of 4 million tokens, which is 32 times som of GPT-4o och 20 times som of Claude-3.5-Sonnet.

MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M1-80k.description: MiniMax-M1 är en large-scale hybrid attention inference model med open-source weights, med 456 billion parameters, med approximately 45.9 billion parameters activated per token. The model natively stöder ultra-long contexts of up to 1 million tokens och, through lightning attention mechanisms, reduces floating-point operations by 75% compared to DeepSeek R1 i tasks generating 100,000 tokens. Additionally, MiniMax-M1 employs a Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture, kombinerar CISPO algorithm med an efficient reinforcement learning training design based på hybrid attention, achieving industry-leading performance i long-input inference och real-world software engineering scenarios.

Moonshot-Kimi-K2-Instruct.description: med a total of 1 trillion parameters och 32 billion activated parameters, denna non-thinking model uppnår top-tier performance i banbrytande knowledge, mathematics, och coding, excelling i general agent tasks. It is carefully optimerad för agent tasks, capable not only of answering questions but also taking actions. Ideal för improvisational, general chat, och agent experiences, it är en reflex-level model requiring no prolonged thinking.

NousResearch/Nous-Hermes-2-Mixtral-8x7B-.description: Nous Hermes 2 - Mixtral 8x7B-DPO (46.7B) är en high-precision instruction model lämplig för complex computations.

OmniConsistency.description: OmniConsistency enhances style consistency och generalization i image-to-image tasks by introducing large-scale Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) och paired stylized data, effectively preventing style degradation.

Phi-3-medium-128k-instruct.description: The same Phi-3-medium model, but med a larger context size för RAG or few-shot prompting.

Phi-3-medium-4k-instruct.description: A 14B parameter model som tillhandahåller better quality than Phi-3-mini, focusing på high-quality, reasoning-dense data.

Phi-3-mini-128k-instruct.description: The same Phi-3-mini model, but med a larger context size för RAG or few-shot prompting.

Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct.description: The smallest member of Phi-3 family, optimerad för both quality och low latency.

Phi-3-small-128k-instruct.description: The same Phi-3-small model, but med a larger context size för RAG or few-shot prompting.

Phi-3-small-8k-instruct.description: A 7B parameter model som tillhandahåller better quality than Phi-3-mini, focusing på high-quality, reasoning-dense data.

Phi-3.5-mini-instruct.description: An updated version of Phi-3-mini model.

Phi-3.5-vision-instrust.description: An updated version of Phi-3-vision model.

Pro/Qwen/Qwen2-7B-Instruct.description: Qwen2-7B-Instruct är en instruction-tuned large language model i Qwen2 series, med a parameter size of 7B. Denna model is based på Transformer architecture och employs techniques such as SwiGLU activation function, attention QKV bias, och group query attention. It can handle large-scale inputs. The model utmärker sig i language understanding, generation, multilingual capabilities, coding, mathematics, och reasoning across multiple benchmark tests, surpassing most open-source models och demonstrating competitive performance comparable to proprietary models i certain tasks. Qwen2-7B-Instruct outperforms Qwen1.5-7B-Chat i multiple evaluations, showing significant performance improvements.

Pro/Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct is one of latest large language models released by Alibaba Cloud. Denna 7B model shows significant improvements i coding och mathematics. It also tillhandahåller multilingual support, covering over 29 languages, inklusive Chinese och English. The model has made notable advancements i instruction following, understanding structured data, och generating structured outputs, especially JSON.

Pro/Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct is senaste versionen i Alibaba Cloud's series of code-specific large language models. Denna model significantly enhances code generation, reasoning, och repair capabilities based på Qwen2.5, trained på 55 trillion tokens. It not only improves coding abilities but also maintains advantages i mathematics och general capabilities, providing a more comprehensive foundation för practical applications such as code agents.

Pro/Qwen/Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5-VL is newest addition to Qwen series, med enhanced visual comprehension capabilities. It can analyze text, charts, och layouts within images, comprehend long videos while capturing events. The model stöder reasoning, tool manipulation, multi-format object localization, och structured output generation. It incorporates optimized dynamic resolution och frame rate training för video understanding, along med improved efficiency i its visual encoder.

Pro/THUDM/GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking.description: GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking är en open-source vision-language model (VLM) jointly released by Zhipu AI och Tsinghua University's KEG Lab, designed specifically för handling complex multimodal cognitive tasks. Based på GLM-4-9B-0414 foundation model, it significantly enhances cross-modal reasoning ability och stability by introducing Chain-of-Thought reasoning mechanism och employing reinforcement learning strategies.

Pro/THUDM/glm-4-9b-chat.description: GLM-4-9B-Chat is open-source version of GLM-4 series pre-trained models launched by Zhipu AI. Denna model utmärker sig i semantics, mathematics, reasoning, code, och knowledge. i addition to supporting multi-turn dialogues, GLM-4-9B-Chat also features advanced capabilities such as web browsing, code execution, custom tool invocation (Function Call), och long-text reasoning. The model stöder 26 languages, inklusive Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, och German. i multiple benchmark tests, GLM-4-9B-Chat has demonstrated excellent performance, such as i AlignBench-v2, MT-Bench, MMLU, och C-Eval. The model stöder a maximum context length of 128K, making it lämplig för academic research och commercial applications.

Pro/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1.description: DeepSeek-R1 är en reinforcement learning (RL) driven inference model som addresses issues of repetitiveness och readability i models. Prior to RL, DeepSeek-R1 introduced cold start data to further optimize inference performance. It performs comparably to OpenAI-o1 i mathematical, coding, och reasoning tasks, och enhances overall effectiveness through carefully designed training methods.

Pro/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen.description: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B är en model derived från Qwen2.5-Math-7B through knowledge distillation. It was fine-tuned using 800,000 carefully selected samples generated by DeepSeek-R1, demonstrating exceptional reasoning capabilities. The model uppnår outstanding performance across multiple benchmarks, inklusive 92.8% accuracy på MATH-500, a 55.5% pass rate på AIME 2024, och a score of 1189 på CodeForces, showcasing strong mathematical och programming abilities för a 7B-scale model.

Pro/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.description: DeepSeek-V3 är en mixed expert (MoE) language model med 671 billion parameters, utilizing multi-head latent attention (MLA) och DeepSeekMoE architecture, combined med a load balancing strategy without auxiliary loss to optimize inference och training efficiency. Pre-trained på 14.8 trillion high-quality tokens och fine-tuned med supervision och reinforcement learning, DeepSeek-V3 outperforms other open-source models och approaches leading closed-source models.

Pro/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1.description: DeepSeek-V3.1 är en hybrid large language model released by DeepSeek AI, med multiple significant upgrades over its predecessor. A key innovation of denna model is integration of both "Thinking Mode" och "Non-thinking Mode," allowing users to flexibly switch between modes by adjusting chat templates to suit different task requirements. Through dedicated post-training optimization, V3.1 significantly enhances performance i tool invocation och Agent tasks, better supporting external search tools och executing complex multi-step tasks. Based på DeepSeek-V3.1-Base, it employs a two-stage long-text extension method to greatly increase training data volume, improving its handling of long documents och extensive code. As an open-source model, DeepSeek-V3.1 visar capabilities comparable to top closed-source models across benchmarks i coding, mathematics, och reasoning. Its Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture maintains a massive model capacity while effectively reducing inference costs.

Pro/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus.description: DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus är en updated version of V3.1 model released by DeepSeek, positioned as a hybrid agent large language model. Denna update focuses på fixing user-reported issues och improving stability while maintaining model's original capabilities. It significantly enhances language consistency, reducing mixing of Chinese och English och occurrence of abnormal characters. The model integrates both "Thinking Mode" och "Non-thinking Mode," allowing users to switch flexibly between chat templates to suit different tasks. As a key optimization, V3.1-Terminus improves performance of Code Agent och Search Agent, making tool invocation och multi-step complex task execution more reliable.

Pro/moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Instruct-0905.description: Kimi K2-Instruct-0905 is latest och most powerful version of Kimi K2. It är en top-tier Mixture of Experts (MoE) language model med a total of 1 trillion parameters och 32 billion activated parameters. Key features of denna model include enhanced agent coding intelligence, demonstrating significant performance improvements i public benchmark tests och real-world agent coding tasks; och an improved frontend coding experience, med advancements i both aesthetics och practicality för frontend programming.

QwQ-32B-Preview.description: QwQ-32B-Preview är en innovative natural language processing model kan efficiently handling complex dialogue generation och context understanding tasks.

Qwen/QVQ-72B-Preview.description: QVQ-72B-Preview är en research-oriented model developed by Qwen team, focusing på visual reasoning capabilities, med unique advantages i understanding complex scenes och solving visually related mathematical problems.

Qwen/QwQ-32B.description: QwQ is inference model of Qwen series. Compared to traditional instruction-tuned models, QwQ possesses reasoning och cognitive abilities, achieving significantly enhanced performance i downstream tasks, especially i solving difficult problems. QwQ-32B är en medium-sized inference model som competes effectively against toppmodern inference models (such as DeepSeek-R1 och o1-mini). Denna model employs technologies such as RoPE, SwiGLU, RMSNorm, och Attention QKV bias, med a 64-layer network structure och 40 Q attention heads (med 8 KV heads i GQA architecture).

Qwen/QwQ-32B-Preview.description: QwQ-32B-Preview is Qwen's latest experimental research model, focusing på förbättrar AI reasoning capabilities. By exploring complex mechanisms such as language mixing och recursive reasoning, its main advantages include strong analytical reasoning, mathematical, och programming abilities. However, it also faces challenges such as language switching issues, reasoning loops, safety considerations, och differences i other capabilities.

Qwen/Qwen2-72B-Instruct.description: Qwen2 är en advanced general-purpose language model som stöder various types of instructions.

Qwen/Qwen2-7B-Instruct.description: Qwen2-72B-Instruct är en instruction-tuned large language model i Qwen2 series, med a parameter size of 72B. Denna model is based på Transformer architecture och employs techniques such as SwiGLU activation function, attention QKV bias, och group query attention. It can handle large-scale inputs. The model utmärker sig i language understanding, generation, multilingual capabilities, coding, mathematics, och reasoning across multiple benchmark tests, surpassing most open-source models och demonstrating competitive performance comparable to proprietary models i certain tasks.

Qwen/Qwen2-VL-72B-Instruct.description: Qwen2-VL is latest iteration of Qwen-VL model, achieving toppmodern performance i visual understanding benchmarks.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5 är en brand new series of large language models designed to optimize handling of instruction-based tasks.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5 är en brand new series of large language models designed to optimize handling of instruction-based tasks.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct.description: A large language model developed by Alibaba Cloud Tongyi Qianwen team

Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct-128K.description: Qwen2.5 är en new large language model series med enhanced understanding och generation capabilities.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct-Turbo.description: Qwen2.5 är en new large language model series designed to optimize instruction-based task processing.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5 är en brand new series of large language models designed to optimize handling of instruction-based tasks.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-Turbo.description: Qwen2.5 är en new large language model series designed to optimize instruction-based task processing.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct är Alibaba Clouds kodspecifika modell, optimerad för kodgenerering och programmeringsuppgifter.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct är Alibaba Clouds kompakta kodmodell, lämplig för effektiv kodgenerering.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct är en multimodal large language model developed by Tongyi Qianwen team, representing part of Qwen2.5-VL series. Denna model excels not only i recognizing common objects but also i analyzing text, charts, icons, graphics, och layouts within images. It functions as a visual agent kan reasoning och dynamically manipulating tools, med ability to operate computers och mobile devices. Additionally, model can precisely locate objects i images och generate structured outputs för documents like invoices och tables. Compared to its predecessor Qwen2-VL, denna version visar enhanced mathematical och problem-solving capabilities through reinforcement learning, while also exhibiting more human-preferred response styles.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-VL-72B-Instruct.description: Qwen2.5-VL is vision-language model i Qwen2.5 series. Denna model visar significant improvements across multiple dimensions: enhanced visual comprehension kan recognizing common objects, analyzing text, charts, och layouts; serving as a visual agent som can reason och dynamically guide tool usage; supporting understanding of long videos exceeding 1 hour while capturing key events; able to precisely locate objects i images by generating bounding boxes or poäng; och kan producing structured outputs particularly lämplig för scanned data like invoices och forms.

Qwen/Qwen3-14B.description: Qwen3 är en next-generation model med significantly enhanced capabilities, achieving industry-leading levels i reasoning, general tasks, agent functions, och multilingual support, med a switchable thinking mode.

Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B.description: Qwen3 är en next-generation model med significantly enhanced capabilities, achieving industry-leading levels i reasoning, general tasks, agent functions, och multilingual support, med a switchable thinking mode.

Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507.description: Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507 är en flagship mixture-of-experts (MoE) large language model developed by Alibaba Cloud Tongyi Qianwen team within Qwen3 series. It has 235 billion total parameters med 22 billion activated per inference. Released as an update to non-thinking mode Qwen3-235B-A22B, it focuses på significant improvements i instruction following, logical reasoning, text comprehension, mathematics, science, programming, och tool usage. Additionally, it enhances coverage of multilingual long-tail knowledge och better aligns med user preferences i subjective och open-ended tasks to generate more helpful och higher-quality text.

Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507.description: Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 är en member of Qwen3 large language model series developed by Alibaba Tongyi Qianwen team, specializing i complex reasoning tasks. Based på a mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture med 235 billion total parameters och approximately 22 billion activated per token, it balances strong performance med computational efficiency. As a dedicated “thinking” model, it significantly improves performance i logic reasoning, mathematics, science, programming, och academic benchmarks requiring human expertise, ranking among top open-source thinking models. It also enhances general capabilities such as instruction following, tool usage, och text generation, natively stöder 256K long-context understanding, och is well-suited för scenarios requiring deep reasoning och long document processing.

Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B.description: Qwen3 är en next-generation model med significantly enhanced capabilities, achieving industry-leading levels i reasoning, general tasks, agent functions, och multilingual support, med a switchable thinking mode.

Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507.description: Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507 är en updated version of Qwen3-30B-A3B non-thinking mode. It är en Mixture of Experts (MoE) model med a total of 30.5 billion parameters och 3.3 billion active parameters. The model features key enhancements across multiple areas, inklusive significant improvements i instruction following, logical reasoning, text comprehension, mathematics, science, coding, och tool usage. Additionally, it has made substantial progress i covering long-tail multilingual knowledge och better aligns med user preferences i subjective och open-ended tasks, enabling it to generate more helpful responses och higher-quality text. Furthermore, its long-text comprehension capability has been extended to 256K tokens. Denna model stöder only non-thinking mode och does not generate `<think></think>` tags i its output.

Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking-2507.description: Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking-2507 is latest “thinking” model i Qwen3 series released by Alibaba’s Tongyi Qianwen team. As a mixture-of-experts (MoE) model med 30.5 billion total parameters och 3.3 billion active parameters, it is designed to improve capabilities för handling complex tasks. The model visar significant performance gains på academic benchmarks requiring logical reasoning, mathematics, science, programming, och domain expertise. vid same time, its general abilities—such as instruction following, tool use, text generation, och alignment med human preferences—have been substantially enhanced. The model natively stöder long-context understanding of 256K tokens och can scale up to 1 million tokens. Denna version is tailored för “thinking mode,” intended to solve highly complex problems through detailed step-by-step reasoning, och it also exhibits strong agent capabilities.

Qwen/Qwen3-32B.description: Qwen3 är en next-generation model med significantly enhanced capabilities, achieving industry-leading levels i reasoning, general tasks, agent functions, och multilingual support, med a switchable thinking mode.

Qwen/Qwen3-8B.description: Qwen3 är en next-generation model med significantly enhanced capabilities, achieving industry-leading levels i reasoning, general tasks, agent functions, och multilingual support, med a switchable thinking mode.

Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct.description: Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct är en code model i Qwen3 series developed by Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen team. As a streamlined och optimized model, it focuses på förbättrar code-handling capabilities while maintaining high performance och efficiency. The model visar notable advantages among open-source models på complex tasks such as agentic coding, automated browser operations, och tool invocation. It natively stöder a long context of 256K tokens och can be extended up to 1M tokens, enabling better understanding och processing vid codebase level. Additionally, model tillhandahåller robust agentic coding support för platforms like Qwen Code och CLINE, och it employs a dedicated function-calling format.

Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct.description: Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct, released by Alibaba, is most agentic code model to date. It är en mixture-of-experts (MoE) model med 480 billion total parameters och 35 billion active parameters, striking a balance between efficiency och performance. The model natively stöder a 256K (~260k) token context window och can be extended to 1,000,000 tokens through extrapolation methods such as YaRN, enabling it to handle large codebases och complex programming tasks. Qwen3-Coder is designad för agent-style coding workflows: it not only generates code but can autonomously interact med development tools och environments to solve complex programming problems. på multiple benchmarks för coding och agent tasks, denna model uppnår top-tier results among open-source models, med performance comparable to leading models like Claude Sonnet 4.

Qwen/Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct.description: Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct is next-generation foundational model released by Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen team. It is based på brand-new Qwen3-Next architecture, designed to achieve ultimate training och inference efficiency. The model employs an innovative hybrid attention mechanism (Gated DeltaNet och Gated Attention), a highly sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) structure, och multiple training stability optimizations. As a sparse model med a total of 80 billion parameters, it activates only about 3 billion parameters during inference, significantly reducing computational costs. When handling long-context tasks exceeding 32K tokens, its inference throughput is more than 10 times higher than Qwen3-32B model. Denna model är en instruction-tuned version designad för general tasks och does not support Thinking mode. i terms of performance, it is comparable to Tongyi Qianwen's flagship Qwen3-235B model på some benchmarks, especially demonstrating clear advantages i ultra-long context tasks.

Qwen/Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Thinking.description: Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Thinking is next-generation foundational model released by Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen team, specifically designad för complex reasoning tasks. It is based på innovative Qwen3-Next architecture, which integrates a hybrid attention mechanism (Gated DeltaNet och Gated Attention) och a highly sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) structure, aiming för ultimate training och inference efficiency. As a sparse model med a total of 80 billion parameters, it activates only about 3 billion parameters during inference, greatly reducing computational costs. When processing long-context tasks exceeding 32K tokens, its throughput is more than 10 times higher than Qwen3-32B model. Denna "Thinking" version is optimerad för executing challenging multi-step tasks such as mathematical proofs, code synthesis, logical analysis, och planning, och by default outputs reasoning process i a structured "chain-of-thought" format. i terms of performance, it not only surpasses higher-cost models like Qwen3-32B-Thinking but also outperforms Gemini-2.5-Flash-Thinking på multiple benchmarks.

anthropic/claude-opus-4.1.description: Claude Opus 4.1 är en plug-och-play alternative to Opus 4, delivering excellent performance och accuracy för practical coding och agent tasks. Opus 4.1 advances toppmodern coding performance to 74.5% på SWE-bench Verified, handling complex multi-step problems med greater rigor och attention to detail.

anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.description: Claude Sonnet 4 significantly improves upon industry-leading capabilities of Sonnet 3.7, excelling i coding med toppmodern 72.7% på SWE-bench. The model balances performance och efficiency, lämplig för both internal och external use cases, och erbjuder enhanced controllability för greater command over outcomes.

anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5.description: Claude Sonnet 4.5 is Anthropic's most intelligent model to date.

ascend-tribe/pangu-pro-moe.description: Pangu-Pro-MoE 72B-A16B är en sparse large language model med 72 billion parameters och 16 billion activated parameters. It is based på Group Mixture of Experts (MoGE) architecture, which groups experts during expert selection phase och constrains tokens to activate an equal number of experts within each group, achieving expert load balancing och significantly improving deployment efficiency på Ascend platform.

azure-DeepSeek-R1-0528.description: Deployed och provided by Microsoft; DeepSeek R1 model has undergone a minor version upgrade, currently vid DeepSeek-R1-0528. i latest update, DeepSeek R1 significantly improves inference depth och reasoning ability by increasing computational resources och introducing algorithmic optimizations i post-training phase. baichuan-m2-32b.description: Baichuan M2 32B är en Mixture of Experts model developed by Baichuan Intelligence, med powerful reasoning capabilities.

baichuan/baichuan2-13b-chat.description: Baichuan-13B är en open-source, commercially usable large language model developed by Baichuan Intelligence, containing 13 billion parameters, achieving best results i its size på authoritative Chinese och English benchmarks.

baidu/ERNIE-4.5-300B-A47B.description: ERNIE-4.5-300B-A47B är en large language model developed by Baidu based på a Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture. The model has a total of 300 billion parameters, but only activates 47 billion parameters per token during inference, balancing powerful performance med computational efficiency. As a core model i ERNIE 4.5 series, it visar outstanding capabilities i text understanding, generation, reasoning, och programming tasks. The model employs an innovative multimodal heterogeneous MoE pretraining method, jointly training text och visual modalities to effectively enhance overall capabilities, especially excelling i instruction following och world knowledge retention.

c4ai-aya-expanse-32b.description: Aya Expanse är en high-performance 32B multilingual model designed to challenge performance of single-language models through innovations i instruction tuning, data arbitrage, preference training, och model merging. It stöder 23 languages.

c4ai-aya-vision-32b.description: Aya Vision är en toppmodern multimodal model som utmärker sig i multiple key benchmarks för language, text, och image capabilities. Denna 32 billion parameter version focuses på banbrytande multilingual performance och stöder 23 languages.

c4ai-aya-vision-8b.description: Aya Vision är en toppmodern multimodal model som utmärker sig i multiple key benchmarks för language, text, och image capabilities. Denna 8 billion parameter version focuses på low latency och optimal performance.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1.description: DeepSeek R1 är en avancerad resonemangsmodell med exceptionell prestanda i matematik, kodning och logiskt tänkande.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-0528.description: DeepSeek R1 significantly enhances its reasoning och inference depth by leveraging increased computational resources och introducing algorithmic optimizations during post-training. The model performs excellently across various benchmarks, inklusive mathematics, programming, och general logic. Its overall performance now approaches leading models such as O3 och Gemini 2.5 Pro.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-0528-Qwen3-8B.description: DeepSeek-R1-0528-Qwen3-8B är en model distilled från DeepSeek-R1-0528's chain of thought into Qwen3 8B Base. It uppnår toppmodern (SOTA) performance among open-source models, surpassing Qwen3 8B by 10% i AIME 2024 test och reaching performance level of Qwen3-235B-thinking. The model utmärker sig i mathematics reasoning, programming, och general logic benchmarks. It shares same architecture as Qwen3-8B but uses tokenizer configuration från DeepSeek-R1-0528.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70.description: The DeepSeek-R1 distillation model optimizes inference performance through reinforcement learning och cold-start data, refreshing benchmark för open-source models across multiple tasks.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5.description: The DeepSeek-R1 distillation model optimizes inference performance through reinforcement learning och cold-start data, refreshing benchmark för open-source models across multiple tasks.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B.description: The DeepSeek-R1 distillation model optimizes inference performance through reinforcement learning och cold-start data, refreshing benchmark för open-source models across multiple tasks.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B.description: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B är en model obtained through knowledge distillation based på Qwen2.5-32B. Denna model is fine-tuned using 800,000 selected samples generated by DeepSeek-R1, demonstrating exceptional performance i mathematics, programming, och reasoning across multiple domains. It has achieved excellent results i various benchmark tests, inklusive a 94.3% accuracy rate på MATH-500, showcasing strong mathematical reasoning capabilities.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B.description: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B är en model obtained through knowledge distillation based på Qwen2.5-Math-7B. Denna model is fine-tuned using 800,000 selected samples generated by DeepSeek-R1, demonstrating excellent reasoning capabilities. It has performed outstandingly i multiple benchmark tests, achieving a 92.8% accuracy rate på MATH-500, a 55.5% pass rate på AIME 2024, och a score of 1189 på CodeForces, showcasing strong mathematical och programming abilities as a 7B scale model.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V2.5.description: DeepSeek V2.5 combines excellent features of previous versions, förbättrar general och coding capabilities.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.description: DeepSeek V3 är en storskalig multimodal modell med toppmodern prestanda inom olika domäner.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1.description: DeepSeek-V3.1 är en hybrid large language model released by DeepSeek AI, med multiple significant upgrades over its predecessor. A key innovation of denna model is integration of both "Thinking Mode" och "Non-thinking Mode," allowing users to flexibly switch between modes by adjusting chat templates to suit different task requirements. Through dedicated post-training optimization, V3.1 significantly enhances performance i tool invocation och Agent tasks, better supporting external search tools och executing complex multi-step tasks. Based på DeepSeek-V3.1-Base, it employs a two-stage long-text extension method to greatly increase training data volume, improving its handling of long documents och extensive code. As an open-source model, DeepSeek-V3.1 visar capabilities comparable to top closed-source models across benchmarks i coding, mathematics, och reasoning. Its Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture maintains a massive model capacity while effectively reducing inference costs.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus.description: DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus är en updated version of V3.1 model released by DeepSeek, positioned as a hybrid agent large language model. Denna update focuses på fixing user-reported issues och improving stability while maintaining model's original capabilities. It significantly enhances language consistency, reducing mixing of Chinese och English och occurrence of abnormal characters. The model integrates both "Thinking Mode" och "Non-thinking Mode," allowing users to switch flexibly between chat templates to suit different tasks. As a key optimization, V3.1-Terminus improves performance of Code Agent och Search Agent, making tool invocation och multi-step complex task execution more reliable.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp.description: The DeepSeek V3.2 Exp model adopts a hybrid reasoning architecture, supporting both reflective och non-reflective modes.

deepseek-ai/deepseek-llm-67b-chat.description: DeepSeek 67B är en advanced model trained för highly complex conversations.

deepseek-ai/deepseek-vl2.description: DeepSeek-VL2 är en mixture of experts (MoE) visual language model developed based på DeepSeekMoE-27B, employing a sparsely activated MoE architecture som uppnår outstanding performance while activating only 4.5 billion parameters. Denna model utmärker sig i various tasks, inklusive visual question answering, optical character recognition, document/table/chart understanding, och visual localization.

deepseek/deepseek-v3.description: A fast, general-purpose large language model med enhanced reasoning capabilities.

deepseek/deepseek-v3.1-base.description: DeepSeek V3.1 Base är en improved version of DeepSeek V3 model.

deepseek/deepseek-v3/community.description: DeepSeek-V3 has achieved a significant breakthrough i inference speed compared to previous models. It ranks first among open-source models och can compete med world's most advanced closed-source models. DeepSeek-V3 employs Multi-Head Latent Attention (MLA) och DeepSeekMoE architectures, which har been thoroughly validated i DeepSeek-V2. Additionally, DeepSeek-V3 introduces an auxiliary lossless strategy för load balancing och sets multi-label prediction training objectives för enhanced performance.

deepseek_r1.description: DeepSeek-R1 är en reinforcement learning (RL) driven reasoning model som addresses issues of repetition och readability within model. Prior to RL, DeepSeek-R1 introduced cold start data to further optimize inference performance. It performs comparably to OpenAI-o1 i mathematics, coding, och reasoning tasks, och enhances overall effectiveness through carefully designed training methods.

deepseek_r1_distill_llama_70b.description: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B är en model obtained through distillation training based på Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct. Denna model is part of DeepSeek-R1 series och showcases excellent performance i mathematics, programming, och reasoning through fine-tuning med samples generated by DeepSeek-R1.

deepseek_r1_distill_qwen_14b.description: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B är en model derived från Qwen2.5-14B through knowledge distillation. Denna model is fine-tuned using 800,000 curated samples generated by DeepSeek-R1, showcasing excellent reasoning capabilities.

deepseek_r1_distill_qwen_32b.description: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B är en model derived från Qwen2.5-32B through knowledge distillation. Denna model is fine-tuned using 800,000 curated samples generated by DeepSeek-R1, demonstrating outstanding performance across multiple domains such as mathematics, programming, och reasoning.

doubao-1.5-lite-32k.description: Doubao-1.5-lite är en new generation lättviktig model, offering extreme response speed med performance och latency vid a world-class level.

doubao-1.5-pro-256k.description: Doubao-1.5-pro-256k är en upgraded version of Doubao-1.5-Pro, significantly förbättrar overall performance by 10%. It stöder reasoning med a 256k context window och an output length of up to 12k tokens. med higher performance, a larger window, och exceptional cost-effectiveness, it is lämplig för a wider range of applications.

doubao-1.5-pro-32k.description: Doubao-1.5-pro är en new generation flagship model med comprehensive performance upgrades, excelling i knowledge, coding, reasoning, och more.

doubao-1.5-thinking-pro.description: Doubao-1.5 är en brand new deep thinking model som utmärker sig i specialized fields such as mathematics, programming, och scientific reasoning, as well as i general tasks like creative writing. It has achieved or is close to top tier of industry standards i several authoritative benchmarks, inklusive AIME 2024, Codeforces, och GPQA. It stöder a 128k context window och 16k output.

doubao-1.5-thinking-pro-m.description: Doubao-1.5 är en brand-new deep thinking model (the m version comes med native multimodal deep reasoning capabilities). It performs outstandingly i specialized fields such as mathematics, programming, scientific reasoning, as well as general tasks like creative writing. It uppnår or approaches top-tier industry benchmarks på AIME 2024, Codeforces, GPQA, och more. stöder a 128k context window och 16k output.

doubao-1.5-thinking-vision-pro.description: A new visual deep thinking model med enhanced general multimodal understanding och reasoning capabilities, achieving toppmodern (SOTA) results på 37 out of 59 public evaluation benchmarks.

doubao-1.5-ui-tars.description: Doubao-1.5-UI-TARS är en native agent model designad för graphical user interface (GUI) interaction. It seamlessly interacts med GUIs through human-like abilities such as perception, reasoning, och action.

doubao-1.5-vision-lite.description: Doubao-1.5-vision-lite är en newly upgraded multimodal large model som stöder image recognition vid any resolution och extreme aspect ratios, förbättrar visual reasoning, document recognition, detail comprehension, och instruction following capabilities. It stöder a context window of 128k och an output length of up to 16k tokens.

doubao-1.5-vision-pro.description: Doubao-1.5-vision-pro är en newly upgraded multimodal large model supporting image recognition vid any resolution och extreme aspect ratios. It enhances visual reasoning, document recognition, detailed information understanding, och instruction compliance.

doubao-1.5-vision-pro-32k.description: Doubao-1.5-vision-pro är en newly upgraded multimodal large model supporting image recognition vid any resolution och extreme aspect ratios. It enhances visual reasoning, document recognition, detailed information understanding, och instruction compliance.

doubao-lite-128k.description: Doubao Lite 128K-modellen är en effektiv och lågkostnadsmodell som stöder extra långa kontextfönster.

doubao-lite-32k.description: erbjuder ultra-fast response times och better cost-effectiveness, providing customers med more flexible options för different scenarios. stöder inference och fine-tuning med a 32k context window.

doubao-lite-4k.description: erbjuder ultra-fast response times och better cost-effectiveness, providing customers med more flexible options för different scenarios. stöder inference och fine-tuning med a 4k context window.

doubao-pro-256k.description: Doubao Pro 256K-modellen är en högpresterande modell som stöder ultralänga kontextfönster.

doubao-pro-32k.description: Doubao Pro 32K-modellen är en högpresterande modell som stöder långa kontextfönster.

doubao-seed-1.6.description: Doubao-Seed-1.6 är en brand-new multimodal deep thinking model supporting auto, thinking, och non-thinking modes. i non-thinking mode, its performance significantly surpasses Doubao-1.5-pro/250115. It stöder a 256k context window och output lengths up to 16k tokens.

doubao-seed-1.6-flash.description: Doubao-Seed-1.6-flash är en ultra-fast multimodal deep thinking model med TPOT inference speed as low as 10ms; it stöder both text och visual understanding. Its text comprehension exceeds previous lite generation, och its visual understanding rivals competitor pro series models. It stöder a 256k context window och output lengths up to 16k tokens.

doubao-seed-1.6-thinking.description: Doubao-Seed-1.6-thinking features greatly enhanced thinking capabilities. Compared to Doubao-1.5-thinking-pro, it further improves foundational skills such as coding, math, och logical reasoning, och stöder visual understanding. It stöder a 256k context window och output lengths up to 16k tokens.

doubao-seed-1.6-vision.description: Doubao-Seed-1.6-vision är en visual deep thinking model som visar stronger general multimodal understanding och reasoning capabilities i scenarios such as education, image review, inspection och security, och AI search Q&A. It stöder a 256k context window och an output length of up to 64k tokens.

doubao-seededit-3-0-i2i-250628.description: Doubao image generation model developed by ByteDance Seed team stöder both text och image inputs, providing a highly controllable och high-quality image generation experience. stöder image editing via text instructions, generating images med dimensions between 512 och 1536 pixels.

doubao-seedream-3-0-t2i-250415.description: Seedream 3.0 image generation model developed by ByteDance Seed team stöder text och image inputs, delivering a highly controllable och high-quality image generation experience. Generates images based på text prompts.

doubao-seedream-4-0-250828.description: Seedream 4.0 image generation model developed by ByteDance Seed team stöder text och image inputs, offering a highly controllable och high-quality image generation experience. Generates images based på text prompts.

doubao-vision-lite-32k.description: The Doubao-vision model är en multimodal large model launched by Doubao, med powerful image understanding och reasoning capabilities along med precise instruction comprehension. doubao-vision-pro-32k.description: Doubao Vision Pro 32K är ByteDances multimodala modell med bildförståelse och långa kontextfönster.

ernie-4.5-8k-preview.description: ERNIE 4.5 is Baidu's self-developed next-generation native multimodal foundational model, achieving collaborative optimization through joint modeling of multiple modalities, med excellent multimodal understanding capabilities; it features enhanced language abilities, med significant improvements i understanding, generation, logic, och memory, as well as reduced hallucinations och improved logical reasoning och coding capabilities.

Compared to Wenxin 4.5, it is faster och more cost-effective. The model's capabilities har been comprehensively improved to better meet needs of multi-turn long history dialogue processing och long document understanding Q&A tasks.

ernie-4.5-turbo-32k.description: Wenxin 4.5 Turbo has also shown significant enhancements i reducing hallucinations, logical reasoning, och coding capabilities. Compared to Wenxin 4.5, it is faster och more cost-effective. There är notable improvements i text creation och knowledge Q&A capabilities. The output length och sentence delay har increased compared to ERNIE 4.5.

ernie-4.5-turbo-vl-32k.description: A brand new version of Wenxin large model, med significant improvements i image understanding, creation, translation, och coding capabilities, now stöder a context length of 32K för first time, med a significant reduction i first token delay.

ernie-lite-8k.description: ERNIE Lite is Baidu's lättviktig large language model, balancing excellent model performance med inference efficiency, lämplig för low-power AI acceleration card inference.

ernie-lite-pro-128k.description: Baidu's lättviktig large language model, balancing excellent model performance med inference efficiency, offering better performance than ERNIE Lite, lämplig för low-power AI acceleration card inference.

ernie-speed-128k.description: Baidu's latest self-developed high-performance large language model released i 2024, med excellent general capabilities, suitable as a base model för fine-tuning to better address specific scenario issues while also demonstrating excellent inference performance.

ernie-speed-pro-128k.description: Baidu's latest self-developed high-performance large language model released i 2024, med excellent general capabilities, offering better performance than ERNIE Speed, suitable as a base model för fine-tuning to better address specific scenario issues while also demonstrating excellent inference performance.

ernie-tiny-8k.description: ERNIE Tiny is Baidu's ultra-high-performance large language model, med lowest deployment och fine-tuning costs among Wenxin series models.

flux-pro-1.1-ultra.description: Ultra-high-resolution AI image generation — stöder up to 4-megapixel output, producing ultra-high-definition images i under 10 seconds.

google/gemini-2.5-flash-preview.description:
Gemini 2.5 Flash is Google's most advanced flagship model, designad för advanced reasoning, coding, mathematics, och scientific tasks. It includes built-i 'thinking' capabilities som allow it to provide responses med higher accuracy och detailed context handling.

Note: Denna model has two variants: thinking och non-thinking. Output pricing varies significantly based på whether thinking capability is activated. If you choose standard variant (without ':thinking' suffix), model kommer explicitly avoid generating thinking tokens.

To leverage thinking capability och receive thinking tokens, you must select ':thinking' variant, which kommer incur higher thinking output pricing.

Additionally, Gemini 2.5 Flash can be configured via 'maximum tokens för reasoning' parameter, as described i documentation (https://openrouter.ai/docs/use-cases/reasoning-tokens#max-tokens-för-reasoning).

inclusionAI/Ling-flash-2.0.description: Ling-flash-2.0 is third model i Ling 2.0 architecture series released by Ant Group's Bailing team. It är en mixture-of-experts (MoE) model med a total of 100 billion parameters, but activates only 6.1 billion parameters per token (4.8 billion non-embedding). As a lättviktig configuration model, Ling-flash-2.0 visar performance comparable to or surpassing 40-billion-parameter dense models och larger MoE models across multiple authoritative benchmarks. The model aims to explore efficient pathways under consensus som "large models equal large parameters" through extreme architectural design och training strategies.

inclusionAI/Ling-mini-2.0.description: Ling-mini-2.0 är en small-sized, high-performance large language model based på MoE architecture. It has 16 billion total parameters but activates only 1.4 billion per token (789 million non-embedding), achieving extremely high generation speed. Thanks to efficient MoE design och large-scale high-quality training data, despite activating only 1.4 billion parameters, Ling-mini-2.0 still levererar top-tier performance comparable to dense LLMs under 10 billion parameters och larger MoE models på downstream tasks.

inclusionAI/Ring-flash-2.0.description: Ring-flash-2.0 är en high-performance reasoning model deeply optimized based på Ling-flash-2.0-base. It employs a mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture med a total of 100 billion parameters but activates only 6.1 billion parameters per inference. The model uses proprietary icepop algorithm to solve instability issues of MoE large models during reinforcement learning (RL) training, enabling continuous improvement of complex reasoning capabilities over long training cycles. Ring-flash-2.0 has achieved significant breakthroughs i challenging benchmarks such as math competitions, code generation, och logical reasoning. Its performance not only surpasses top dense models under 40 billion parameters but also rivals larger open-source MoE models och closed-source high-performance reasoning models. Although focused på complex reasoning, it also performs well i creative writing tasks. Additionally, thanks to its efficient architecture, Ring-flash-2.0 levererar strong performance med high-speed inference, significantly reducing deployment costs för reasoning models i high-concurrency scenarios.
